title: Mitiyala Lion Sanctuary
tagline: Mitiyala Lion Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Gujarat

overview.short: Mitiyala Wildlife Sanctuary also known as Mitiyala Grasslands is situated near Mitiyala in Gujarat.
overview.description: Mitiyala Wildlife Sanctuary also known as Mitiyala Grasslands is situated near Mitiyala in Gujarat. The jungle was a part of erstwhile Bhavnagar princely state before independence of India in 1947. Mitiyala Wildlife Sanctuary occupies 18.22 km2 and its status was confirmed in 2004. It is home to almost 11 to 12 lions and leopards.

topPlaces.name: Khambha
topPlaces.description: Khambha is a town in Amreli district of Saurashtra region of Gujarat state in India which is also the administrative headquarters of Khambha taluka. The main occupation of the people of Khambha village is agriculture, farm labor, animal husbandry and the main crops are wheat, cumin, groundnut, sesame, millet, chickpea, cotton, diwela, alfalfa and vegetables.

topPlaces.name: Lilia, Gujarat
topPlaces.description: Lilia is the administrative headquarters of Lilia taluka in Amreli district of Saurashtra region in the western part of Gujarat, India.

The main occupation of the people of Khambha village is agriculture, farm labor, animal husbandry and the main crops are wheat, cumin, groundnut, sesame, millet, chickpea, cotton, diwela, alfalfa and vegetables.
Lilia is the administrative headquarters of Lilia taluka in Amreli district of Saurashtra region in the western part of Gujarat, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mitiyala Lion Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mitiyala Lion Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mitiyala Lion Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Diu Airport (62 km) and the nearest railway station is Rajkot Junction (133 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mitiyala Lion Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mitiyala Lion Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mitiyala Lion Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Mitiyala Lion Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mitiyala Lion Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Khambha, Lilia, Gujarat.
